title: chloraea gavilu
intro: Chloraea gavilu, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Chloraea gavilu has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use.
